text.title: Outsource Onboarding One-Pager Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Outsource Onboarding One-Pager Template.

example.scenario: Hiring designer-x for /pricing redesign. One-pager: scope = '/pricing redesign + /home hero', d1 wireframe in 24h, daily-standup + Friday call, full Figma + Slack guest + GitHub-read access, €80/hr biweekly Wise, 2-week trial on first 2 deliverables.
